_description: Norwegian standard chart of accounts: account number ranges → locked vatType ID. 0 = no VAT treatment, 1 = incoming 25%, 3 = outgoing 25%. Most accounts outside 3xxx/4xxx/6xxx are locked to 0.

locked_to_0.description: Balance sheet (1xxx), liabilities (2xxx), payroll (5xxx), other opex (7xxx), finance (8xxx)

incoming_vat_25.description: Cost of goods (4xxx), operating expenses (6xxx) - incoming 25% VAT
